experiences.title: Frontend Developer at Novicell
experiences.description: Building large-scale B2B and B2C e-commerce platforms. Working with TypeScript in Vue and React to deliver high-quality frontends. Refining and estimating user stories, code reviews, debugging, mentoring. Collaboration with backend developers, designers, testers and product owners. Working in a SCRUM environment.

experiences.title: UI Developer at Grundfos
experiences.description: Prototyping app concepts and designing interfaces for water pump technicians in Figma, collaborating with data scientists. Building a landing page for an internal hackathon in React.

experiences.title: Frontend Developer & UX/UI Designer at ParkShare
experiences.description: Building UI components and a design system for a parking booking system in React. UX research and designing new features in Figma.
